action.reasoning: Observation: We confirmed in iteration 7 that enhance_batch is differentiable and gradients flow to all parameters (max grad 3926, min grad 82). The pretrained MetricGAN+ scored PESQ 3.134 on the hidden test set. Analysis: Fine-tuning this pretrained model on the provided VoiceBank+DEMAND split with a perceptual loss (MR-STFT + L1) is the most promising path to improve PESQ further. Before committing to long runs, I need to validate the training pipeline locally with 1 epoch, measure epoch time, and ensure predict.py can load our fine-tuned weights. Decision: Write train.py with fixed-length random crops (2s), batch_size=8, lr=5e-5, MR-STFT+L1 loss, and gradient clipping. Update predict.py to load base architecture from pretrained_metricgan and overlay any .pt state_dict. Run 1 epoch to verify pipeline and measure speed.
